package.name: vtr_motion_planner
package.description:
Phase 4 of the Visual Teach-and-Repeat (VTR) navigation system. Implements local motion planning and obstacle avoidance using a pre-cached trajectory library, 2D occupancy grid from LiDAR, and a goal-alignment scoring function fed by Phase 3 goal lists.
Based on: Wang et al., "Robust Visual Teach-and-Repeat Navigation with Flexible Topo-metric Graph Map Representation", arXiv:2510.09089v1
